title: LAUNCH & VERIFY
body: Open your browser. Navigate to your Perspective URL. Log in. You should see your view with live data from your PLC. Congratulations — you have a working Ignition SCADA system.
code:
Browser URL:
  http://localhost:8088/data/perspective/client/MyPlant

You should see:
  ✓ Your view rendering
  ✓ Live tag values updating
  ✓ Components bound to PLC data
key: Works on any device with a browser
Mobile responsive if you use Flex containers
mistakes: Accessing via HTTP when HTTPS is required by auth config
Not testing on mobile/tablet viewport sizes
Forgetting to set up authentication before going to production
